properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holy Spirit, rain down, rain down Oh, Comforter and Friend How we need Your touch again Holy Spirit, rain down, rain down

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let Your power fall Let Your voice be heard Come and change our hearts As we stand on Your word Holy Spirit, rain down, rain down

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let Your power fall Let Your voice be heard Come and change our hearts As we stand on Your word Holy Spirit, rain down

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No eye has seen, no ear has heard No mind can know what God has in store Open up Heaven, open it wide Over Your church and over our lives

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Holy Spirit, rain down, rain down Let Your power fall Let Your voice be heard Come and change our hearts As we stand on Your word Holy Spirit, Holy Spirit

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Holy Spirit, rain down Please rain down Please rain down I need you Fill us, fill us, Lord Change us, We need Your to change us now Rain down, thank you Lord
